name: Peanut Butter Shortbreads
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a bowl, combine the butter, sugar, and peanut butter with your fingers until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
3. Add the flour and mix well.
4. Press the mixture into an ungreased 8-inch round pan.
5. Use a fork to prick decorative wedges in the dough.
6. Bake for about 1 hour, or until very lightly browned.
7. Cut into wedges while warm. Makes 16 wedge-shaped cookies.
